name: Powers Park
description: Powers Park is a place to play pickleball in Lyndon, VT. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Powers Recreation Park
description: Come play pickleball at Powers Recreation Park in Lyndonville, VT! There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: RecFit
description: RecFit is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. Johnsbury, VT. There are 4 outdoor clay courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and lights.
